title: ptilagrostis alpina
intro: Ptilagrostis alpina, also known as Alpine Brome or Wood Brome, is a type of grass native to mountainous regions in North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ptilagrostis alpina include treating wounds, reducing swelling, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
